mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment with a specific plan tier. The batch contains UpdatePlanPage which handles plan changes for already enrolled printers, but does not contain enrollment functionality. The RTPDS payload files (RTPDS-PayLoad-IIC.json and RTPDS-PayLoad-IPH.json) contain printer supply status data but are not enrollment methods. Enrollment functionality likely exists in different batches containing enrollment page objects or API helpers.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires verifying subscription state (no free months). The batch contains UpdatePlanPage which has locators for free trial info display (free_trial_plan_details, paper_free_months, free_trial_info_card) but these are for DISPLAYING free trial information, not for VERIFYING or SETTING UP the subscription state. No API helpers or verification methods for checking subscription state were found in this batch. Subscription state verification methods likely exist in API helper files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires verifying subscription status is 'subscribed'. No API helpers, verification methods, or status checking utilities were found in this batch. The UpdatePlanPage contains UI elements for plan management but not for subscription status verification. Status verification methods likely exist in API helper or subscription management files in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires pausing the plan via UI interaction. The batch contains UpdatePlanPage which has pause-related locators (pause_plan_info, resume_plan_link, plan_100_resume_tag, plan_100_resume_button) but these are for RESUMING a paused plan or DISPLAYING pause information, not for PAUSING the plan initially. No 'Pause Plan' button or 'Pause Instant Ink' link locators were found. The pause plan functionality likely exists on a different page (possibly the main dashboard or plan details page) in other batches.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason:
This test case is for the 'Print and Payment History' page with focus on the Billing Cycle Period card, progress bars for complimentary and additional pages, tooltips, and page usage tracking during a paused plan scenario. The codebase batch 16 contains the UpdatePlanPage page object which is for the 'Update Plan' (also called 'Change Plan') page where users select and change their Instant Ink plan tiers. These are two completely different pages with different purposes:

**Test Case Target Page:** Print and Payment History page
- Purpose: Display billing cycle information, page usage history, payment history
- Key elements needed: billing_cycle_period_card, complimentary_pages_progress_bar, additional_pages_progress_bar, complimentary_pages_value_text, additional_pages_value_text, total_pages_printed_text, plan_pause_information_text, info icons, tooltips
- Functionality: View-only page showing historical data and current usage status

**Batch 16 Page Object:** UpdatePlanPage (Change Plan page)
- Purpose: Allow users to change their Instant Ink plan tier (10, 25, 50, 100, 300, 500, 700, 1500 pages)
- Key elements: plan selection cards (plan_10 through plan_1500), change plan buttons, upgrade/downgrade modals, plan details card, billing/shipping change links
- Functionality: Interactive page for plan management actions

There is NO overlap between the UI elements needed by the test case and the UI elements provided by UpdatePlanPage. The test case requires progress bars, page usage displays, and billing cycle information which are not present on the Update Plan page. The UpdatePlanPage contains plan selection cards, change plan buttons, and plan management modals which are not needed by this test case.

Additionally:
- The test case requires time manipulation APIs (shift_time_by_days, trigger_billing_charge) - not found in this batch
- The test case requires print simulation APIs (register_print_job) - not found in this batch
- The test case requires navigation to Print and Payment History page - UpdatePlanPage does not provide this navigation
- The RTPDS payload files in this batch are for printer supply status reporting, not for page usage tracking or billing cycle display
- The address_data.json file contains shipping addresses, not relevant to billing cycle or page usage display

The PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage page object, along with all required locators, verification methods, API helpers for time manipulation and print simulation, and navigation methods, likely exist in different batches containing print history, payment history, or dashboard page objects.
